scripts.clean-build-for-repo: npm ci --include=dev && cd frontend && rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.audit:head: node scripts/audit-deployment-url.mjs https://head.akiprisaye-web.pages.dev/
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.test:smoke:home: cd frontend && npx vitest run src/test/home.page.test.tsx --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.clean-build:repo: npm run install:frontend && npm run lint:ci && cd frontend && npm run test && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/smoke-preview.mjs && cd frontend && npm run audit
scripts.clean-build:repo:network-tolerant: npm run install:frontend && npm run lint:ci && cd frontend && npm run test && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/smoke-preview.mjs && (cd frontend && npm run audit || echo "[WARN] npm audit indisponible (réseau/registry). Relancer plus tard.")
scripts.clean-build:quick: npm run install:frontend && npm run lint:ci && npm run test:smoke:home && npm run build:frontend
scripts.check:firebase: cd frontend && npm install --silent && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts firebase-config
scripts.seo:generate: node scripts/generate-seo-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-seo-content.mjs && node scripts/build-internal-links.mjs
scripts.seo:review-plan: npm run seo:loop && node scripts/auto-seo/build-patches.mjs && node scripts/auto-seo/export-pr-plan.mjs
scripts.seo:full: npm run seo:generate && npm run seo:sitemap && npm run seo:validate && npm run seo:review-plan
